message:
fix: remove rig prefix from overflow polecat names (cherry-pick from PR #1499)

Cherry-picked the overflow naming fix only. The original PR bundled 5 other
unrelated changes which should be submitted separately.

Fixes double-prefix session names like gt-gastown_manager-gastown_manager-142
by having formatOverflowName return just the number instead of rigname-N.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/1499
Author: thanakijwanavit
Co-authored-by: Nic Wanavit <nicwanavit@users.noreply.github.com>
